title: YOUEON 3 Pack Radiant Tambourine with Double Row Jingles, 15/20/25 cm Hand Held Drum, Reflective Tambourines for Adults, Musical Instrumen for Church, Dance, Party, KTV
features: 3 SIZES: YOUEON radiant tambourines come with 3 sizes: L: 10"/25cm D x 2"/5cm H, M: 8"/20cm D x 2"/5cm H, S: 6"/15cm D x 2"/5cm H. Lightweight and portable, you can take them everywhere. Note: This product is suitable for children aged 7 and above and adults.

EASY TO PLAY: Simply shake the hand drum gently to make a pleasant sound. With double bells, the sound is louder and more melodious than the ordinary single layer drums. Beginners can also easily use it to develop a sense of rhythm.

WIDELY APPLICATION: Wonderful percussion instrument, perfect for church, parties, camping, bar, concerts, KTV, dancing, etc. It is also a good gift for family and friends who like music at Christmas, birthdays and parties.

reflective pattern with different shimmering effects at different viewpoints, which can create a more active atmosphere with both visual and sound enjoyment, allowing you and the audience to immerse yourself in the music.

PREMIUM QUALITY: The drum ring of the tambourines for adults is made of natural wood, the drum surface is made of high tenacity ABS, and the double row of bells is made of stainless steel. The right size, polished smooth edges, you can easily hold in your hand.
description: Product Description YOUEON 3 Pack Radiant Tambourine with Double Row Jingles Material: Wood, ABS, Stainless steel Sizes: L: 10"/25cm D x 2"/5cm H, M: 8"/20cm D x 2"/5cm H, S: 6"/15cm D x 2"/5cm H Portable wooden tambourine, lightweight and portable, easy to carry. Special reflective drumheads have a shiny and sparkling effect at different viewing angles. Double row stainless steel cymbals can make louder melodious. Easy to play, just shake or flip to make plink. A great accompaniment instrument for dancing, singing, parties, karaoke, children's games, music lessons, worship, etc. Details Special reflective drum head have shiny and sparkly effect at different viewing angles. The bells are made of high quality stainless steel for a crisp, clear sound. The finger holes are anti-drop, making it less likely to come off when playing. Lightweight and portable, you can take them everywhere.
